calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Brian Kosch's Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders set aside the Notice of Settlement of Entire Case, filed December 23, 2025, under the provisions of Code of Civil Procedure section 473 on the grounds of mistake and inadvertence, in that Plaintiff's counsel filed the Notice in this case by mistake.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
